message:
fix(fp-conformance): assert_excel_roundtrip writes with index=false (br-frankenpandas-mxho)

Identical root cause to 989b but in the fuzz-side helper:
assert_excel_roundtrip wrote via the public write_excel_bytes default
(index=true, pandas-aligned) and read back with default
ExcelReadOptions (no index_col), so the original index leaked back as
a leading data column and frame.equals(reparsed) returned false.

Mirrors 989b's fix: write with ExcelWriteOptions { index: false, .. }
so the writer emits exactly what the default reader will recover. This
unblocks tests::fuzz_excel_io_bytes_accepts_valid_seed_fixture and
keeps the fuzz harness checking real round-trip parity instead of
defaulting to a known-divergent default-pair.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
